reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally suitable for computer work (solo). While there is a window for natural light and a mirror for video calls, the presence of a bidet, sink, toilet, towel, and a marble floor suggests this is more likely a bathroom rather than a workspace. The lack of a flat work surface and ergonomic seating makes it difficult to set up a productive workstation.
